title: Greenpill 2025: A Year in Review
dek: A network-level look at the service days, local gatherings, podcast archive, Regen Coordination work, and hard-earned lessons that shaped Greenpill's 2025.
excerpt: A network-level 2025 review covering IRL service, Ethereum Localism, the Greenpill podcast, Regen Coordination, and the lessons shaping 2026.
body:
Greenpill's 2025 was a year of local service, ecosystem building, and honest reflection.

Across the network, chapters and guilds kept showing up: Greenpill Goonies Giveback service activity around ETHDenver, GFEL Boulder and Ethereum Localism, 280+ podcast episodes across multiple seasons and mini-series, Regen Coordination and CIDS adoption work, Regen Commons, Gardens-based conviction voting, Localism Fund discussions, and candid notes on dormancy, coordination overhead, grant dependency, and volunteer burnout.

Read it as a field report from the network's year: what gathered momentum, what strained the system, and what seeds are worth carrying into 2026.

## Sources

- S070: https://paragraph.com/@greenpill/preview/8QcFgBeASBiEy4QVxmZj
author: Greenpill Network research
